arts.ttl: George Edmundson, Neto Borges - Middlesbrough injury update for Plymouth Argyle - Teesside Live
arts.sum: The return is a further boost to Boro ’s defensive options for the all-important season run-in as Michael Carrick’s side battle for a play-off spot. Offering an update before the Plymouth game on Good Friday, Carrick said: “George is back training with the group.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak Middlesbrough injury update as Liverpool loan closes in on end point
arts.sum: Michael Carrick is not yet writing off the chances of Ben Doak playing again for Middlesbrough, but admits time is running out for the Liverpool loanee. Asked for an update on Doak’s status, with Boro having only four games now remaining in their regular season, Carrick said: “It will get to that stage.
